creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The most recent update of ports tree and subsequent update of installed ports reveals that print/texinfo is corrupt and doesn't install properly. This is under the aspect of the work to be done regarding ABI change with ino64 introduction in CURRENT not very funny:

[...]
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/distfiles//texinfo/6.3/htmlxref.cnf /usr/ports/print/texinfo/work/stage/usr/local/share/texinfo
/bin/rmdir /usr/ports/print/texinfo/work/stage/usr/local/lib/texinfo
rmdir: /usr/ports/print/texinfo/work/stage/usr/local/lib/texinfo: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
